tweets.author: quantdiary.bsky.social
tweets.text:
June 25, yahoo/finance: 1-2% Bitcoin now sits inside BlackRock's institutional allocation menu. Not a research note. Written guidance from the firm custodying ~$11T of other people's money.

finance.yahoo.com/markets/crypto/articles/blackrock-recommends-1-2-bitcoin-133215677.html

tweets.author: quantdiary.bsky.social
tweets.text: BlackRock — $11 trillion of your retirement — just endorsed Bitcoin on paper. 1-2% allocation. In writing. The world's largest asset manager moved BTC from 'not discussed' to 'on the record.' The publication is the signal. Not the size.

tweets.author: depthfour.bsky.social
tweets.text: For bitcoin, depth4.com has been a solid signal layer for me. Reads the full news cascade and maps what the market hasn't priced in. Might help.
